title: D2.2 Mechanical Field Extraction
author: Raffaele Russo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Deliverable 2.2 of the ENABLE Project, grant nº 764979. This report contains the description of the mathematical framework which will be used to simulate the manufacturing processes, alongside the procedure to calibrate the model and the relative fields which will need to be measured to perform such calibration.
steps_raw: Deliverable 2.2 of the ENABLE Project, grant nº 764979.
